comments.body:
> Thought we needed latest/greatest @vrothberg?

v1.10 is the latest :) Dan and I were secretly cutting it over the weekend (https://github.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.10).
I always prefer vendoring releases of our libraries before cutting a new release for Buildah and Podman. This will hopefully ease packaging for Debian and grow confidence of that community.
Thanks @vrothberg I'm going to close this PR and will spin up a new one.  Backtracking to an earlier version in the same branch always gives me the willies.
